focus_node: Phase 10 implementation planning — Evidence-Based Priority System

query_summary.intent: Resolve T1-T6 theory issues and define implementation plan for Evidence-Based Priority System
key_findings: T1-T6 fully resolved via dialog.md discussion chain
Three-layer architecture defined: scripts (stable core) + agent (evolving intelligence) + human (arbitration)
Cascade order established: Code Reality > Live State > Documentation with evidence_grade
New phases 10/11/12 created in PLAN.md for implementation

next_steps_todo.task: Phase 10.1: Add type classification (code_reality | live_state | documentation) to frontmatter schema
Phase 10.2: Rewrite contradiction_resolution_flow in process-query.json with cascade-based logic
Phase 10.3: Create scripts/classify-source.sh for domain whitelist checking
Phase 10.4: Add evidence_grade extraction to agent prompt at ingest/query
